## ⚡ Performance Issue Description
What seems slow or resource-intensive?

## 🔄 Steps to Reproduce
1. Load model: [e.g. Q4 GGUF]
2. Generate text of length: [e.g. 100 characters]
3. Expected vs actual generation time

## 📊 Performance Metrics
| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Generation Time | [e.g. 120s for 2s audio] |
| RTF (Real-Time Factor) | [e.g. 60x] |
| RAM Usage | [e.g. 2.5GB] |
| CPU Usage | [e.g. 90%] |

## 🖥️ Environment
- **Platform:** 
- **Device:** 
- **RAM:** 
- **CPU:** 
- **Model Used:** 

## 📝 Additional Context
Any other information that might help diagnose the performance issue.
